sourceSummary.oneLine: Contents listing for clinical evaluation-related documents with document numbers, revision numbers, and revision dates.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports traceability of clinical evaluation, PMCF, literature study, checklist, declaration, clinical study, and participant CV documents.
keyPoints: Clinical Evaluation Plan is Document No. A-TCF-5-117, Revision No. 2, Revision Date March 8, 2024.

Post Market Clinical Follow-up Evaluation Report is Document No. A-PMCFEP-5-001, Revision No. 0, with Revision Date stated as a year after it is on the market.
Literature Study is Document No. A-TCF-5-120, Revision No. 2, Revision Date March 8, 2024.
